code: {/*CustomSection recibe el parametro children, donde ira alojado todo lo que se desee introducir dentro de dicha seccion.*/}{/*CustomSection permite ocultar secciones teniendo en cuenta el rango de vision del usuario.*/}import{useState,useRef,useEffect}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";function CustomSection(_ref){let{children}=_ref;const sectionRef=useRef(null);const[isVisible,setIsVisible]=useState(false);useEffect(()=>{const observer=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{entries.forEach(entry=>{setIsVisible(entry.isIntersecting);});});observer.observe(sectionRef.current);return()=>{observer.disconnect();};},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{ref:sectionRef,className:"Section ".concat(isVisible?'Show':'Hide'),children:children});}export default CustomSection;
